scenarios.title: E-commerce — image tagging + CRM sync
scenarios.problem: When new products are uploaded to Shopify, images need to be automatically tagged and synced with HubSpot. Currently, inventory and product data often become inconsistent between systems due to manual updates.
scenarios.goal: Automate image tagging and keep inventory + product data synced in near real-time

scenarios.title: E-commerce — customer support automation
scenarios.context: DTC skincare brand with high order volume
scenarios.problem: Queries come via email and chat (~1000/week), and there is no clear triaging or escalation logic for complex cases.
scenarios.goal: Auto-handle common queries and escalate complex ones

scenarios.title: SaaS — lead routing + enrichment
scenarios.context: B2B SaaS company selling to enterprises
scenarios.problem: Leads are not enriched (e.g. company size, industry) and routing delays of several hours reduce conversion rates.
scenarios.goal: Auto-enrich, score, and route leads to the right rep

scenarios.title: Finance ops — invoice processing
scenarios.context: Small finance team handling supplier invoices
scenarios.problem: Invoices (200+ weekly) arrive in multiple formats (PDF, scanned images), and manual entry leads to frequent errors and delays.
constraints: Requires error handling and human fallback
scenarios.goal: Extract key data automatically and push to accounting system

scenarios.title: Real estate — lead capture + follow-up
scenarios.context: Real estate agency handling property inquiries
scenarios.problem: Leads are not followed up within the first hour, leading to significant drop-off in conversion rates.

scenarios.title: Healthcare — appointment + data flow
scenarios.problem: Appointments are booked across multiple channels and not synced properly, causing scheduling conflicts.
constraints: Tools: Calendly, Salesforce Health Cloud, EMIS
Must comply with healthcare data regulations (e.g. GDPR)
scenarios.goal: Centralise bookings and reduce manual coordination

scenarios.title: Internal ops — document search
scenarios.context: Mid-size company with lots of internal docs
scenarios.problem: Employees spend ~30–60 minutes daily searching across fragmented systems, reducing productivity.
scenarios.goal: Enable natural language search across internal knowledge

scenarios.title: Marketing — campaign performance tracking
scenarios.problem: Data from ads, email, and website analytics is fragmented and hard to analyse. Marketing decisions are delayed due to lack of unified reporting, making it difficult to optimise campaigns in real time.
scenarios.goal: Unify data into a single reporting dashboard

scenarios.title: Logistics — order tracking + alerts
scenarios.problem: When shipment status changes via ShipBob API, customers are not proactively notified, leading to increased support tickets.
scenarios.goal: Provide real-time tracking updates and proactive alerts

scenarios.title: Sales — call summary + next step recommendations
scenarios.problem: Sales team needs call summaries and next-step recommendations automatically after every demo call.
scenarios.goal: After each demo call (5–10 per rep weekly), generate structured summaries, key objections, and recommended next steps, and sync them into Salesforce
